series_metadata.series_description: This series contains evidence and correspondence gathering during an investigation of a school and includes investigative inquiries, written complaint files, and non-registered schools.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for four (4) years then destroy provided investigation is complete and there is no pending legal action. ; Electronic: Retain for four (4) years then destroy provided investigation is complete and there is no pending legal action., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Wastepaper
